arts.ttl: Zambrotta: “Vlahovic will score 30 goals for Juve this season”
arts.sum: Former Italian international and Serie A veteran Gianluca Zambrotta shared his insights on the current Italian football landscape, from the title race to individual performances and coaching changes. Speaking with La Gazzetta dello Sport, Zambrotta touched on the Serie A title race, his former clubs Juventus and Milan, and recalled his experiences with now Bianconeri coach Thiago Motta. On the Scudetto race, Zambrotta states, “Inter dominated last season’s Serie A, so they’re the team to beat. But Napoli is at the top, and without European competitions, they can recover and prepare better for matches. Juventus is close: they’ve done very The post Zambrotta: “Vlahovic will score 30 goals for Juve this season” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Juventus make bold move in transfer market: Contact established for Jonathan David
arts.sum: Juventus have taken concrete steps towards securing Jonathan David, the talented Canadian striker currently playing for Lille. Recent reports from Calciomercato indicate that the Old Lady’s transfer team has made contact with David’s agents, seeking detailed information about potential salary demands, agent fees, and contract duration. The discussions were comprehensive, with David expressing his interest in Serie A and the prospect of joining the Bianconeri. David has officially informed Lille that he will not be renewing his contract, which expires in July.
